text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let me see... I believe I need to get off at the
next station... And then I'll need to change to a
different line... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text:
"Now approaching the final stop. I repeat, the
final stop. Please mind your footing when leaving
the train."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, deary me! I didn't mean to ride the train this
far...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hmm... If I take the next train, I should make it back in time for training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how perfect! Trainer will be most pleased if I
bring a souvenir to the training session. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, Station Attendant. Do you happen to
know where I might find a gift shop?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Bean buns steamed at hot springs, bath salts,
yukata, and tofu skins... There are so many
wonderful items to choose from...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I might not have much time to browse, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I must find a gift that reflects my gratitude for all
the time and effort Trainer has devoted to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright is so particular about the gift that
she ends up missing the training session entirely.
